utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides separate physical and mental health entries, each with provider, coverage limit, monthly cost, plus deductible/compliance details. This is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, coverage description, monthly cost, and a quality rating. This meets the requirement. 3) travel_coverage: format asks for travel insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, coverage scope, monthly cost, and focus. This meets the requirement. 4) additional_services: format asks for any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes photography equipment insurance with provider, coverage amount, monthly cost, and status. This meets the requirement. 5) total_budget: format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_total and annual_total plus extra details. This is fully specified. Therefore all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each provider in the final plan and match to the closest ground-truth item name. Physical health 'SecureLife Basic Physical Health' aligns with 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. Mental health 'SecureLife Basic Mental Health' aligns with 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. Property coverage 'SecureLife Basic Home Contents' aligns with property_protection.home_content 'SecureLife Basic Coverage'. Travel coverage 'MedSecure Basic Travel' aligns with mobility_coverage.travel_insurance 'MedSecure Basic Plan'. Photography equipment insurance is not listed in ground-truth, so no rating available and is omitted.
